Part.Source:
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, SpedAno, SpedMes Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FiLCod Where SpedAno = &SpedAno Where SpedMes = &SpedMes
&SdtSpedE110.SpedVlrIcmsAnt = SpedVlrIcmsAnt &SdtSpedE110.SpedVlrIcmsAjusCred = SpedVlrIcmsAjusCred
&SdtSpedE110.SpedVlrIpiAnt = SpedVlrIpiAnt
&SdtSpedE110.SpedCodOutDeb = SpedCodOutDeb &SdtSpedE110.SpedDesOutDeb = SpedDesOutDeb //SpedVlrOutDeb &SdtSpedE110.SpedCodOutCred = SpedCodOutCred &SdtSpedE110.SpedDesOutCred = SpedDesOutCred
&SdtSpedE110.SpedE116Rec = SpedE116Rec &SdtSpedE110.SpedE116Cod = SpedE116Cod &SdtSpedE110.SpedE116DiaVct = SpedE116DiaVct &SdtSpedE110.SpedContGerC500 = SpedContGerC500
&SdtSpedE110.SpedH010CtaAna = SpedH010CtaAna &SdtSpedE110.SpedContPisCofins = SpedContPisCofins
if not SpedM205Num.IsEmpty() and not SpedM205Num.IsNull() //DELETAR CAMPOS APOS O MES 09 &SpedM205 = new() &SpedM205.SpedM205_Cod = SpedM205Cod &SpedM205.SpedM205_Num = SpedM205Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM205.Add(&SpedM205)
&SpedM605 = new() &SpedM605.SpedM605_Cod = SpedM605Cod &SpedM605.SpedM605_Num = SpedM605Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM605.Add(&SpedM605) Else For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, (SpedAno), (SpedMes), SpedM205_Num &SpedM205 = new() &SpedM205.SpedM205_Cod = SpedM205_Cod &SpedM205.SpedM205_Num = SpedM205_Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM205.Add(&SpedM205) EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, (SpedAno), (SpedMes), SpedM605_Num &SpedM605 = new() &SpedM605.SpedM605_Cod = SpedM605_Cod &SpedM605.SpedM605_Num = SpedM605_Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM605.Add(&SpedM605) EndFor Endif
Exit When None
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, (SpedAno), (SpedMes) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FiLCod Where SpedAno <= &SpedAno //Where SpedMes <= &SpedMes or SpedAno <= &SpedAno
&SdtSpedE110.SpedVlrIcmsAnt = SpedVlrIcmsPrx + SpedVlrIcmsAjusCred &SdtSpedE110.SpedVlrIpiAnt = SpedVlrIpiPrx
&SdtSpedE110.SpedCodOutDeb = SpedCodOutDeb &SdtSpedE110.SpedDesOutDeb = SpedDesOutDeb //SpedVlrOutDeb &SdtSpedE110.SpedCodOutCred = SpedCodOutCred &SdtSpedE110.SpedDesOutCred = SpedDesOutCred //SpedVlrOutCred
&SdtSpedE110.SpedE116Rec = SpedE116Rec &SdtSpedE110.SpedE116Cod = SpedE116Cod &SdtSpedE110.SpedE116DiaVct = SpedE116DiaVct &SdtSpedE110.SpedContGerC500 = SpedContGerC500
&SdtSpedE110.SpedH010CtaAna = SpedH010CtaAna &SdtSpedE110.SpedContPisCofins = SpedContPisCofins
if not SpedM205Num.IsEmpty() and not SpedM205Num.IsNull() //DELETAR CAMPOS APOS O MES 09 &SpedM205 = new() &SpedM205.SpedM205_Cod = SpedM205Cod &SpedM205.SpedM205_Num = SpedM205Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM205.Add(&SpedM205)
&SpedM605 = new() &SpedM605.SpedM605_Cod = SpedM605Cod &SpedM605.SpedM605_Num = SpedM605Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM605.Add(&SpedM605) Else For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, (SpedAno), (SpedMes), SpedM205_Num &SpedM205 = new() &SpedM205.SpedM205_Cod = SpedM205_Cod &SpedM205.SpedM205_Num = SpedM205_Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM205.Add(&SpedM205) EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, (SpedAno), (SpedMes), SpedM605_Num &SpedM605 = new() &SpedM605.SpedM605_Cod = SpedM605_Cod &SpedM605.SpedM605_Num = SpedM605_Num &SdtSpedE110.SpedM605.Add(&SpedM605) EndFor Endif
Exit EndFor
new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FiLCod SpedAno = &SpedAno SpedMes = &SpedMes SpedVlrIcmsAnt = &SdtSpedE110.SpedVlrIcmsAnt SpedVlrIpiAnt = &SdtSpedE110.SpedVlrIpiAnt SpedVlrIcmsAjusCred = 0
SpedCodOutDeb = &SdtSpedE110.SpedCodOutDeb SpedDesOutDeb = &SdtSpedE110.SpedDesOutDeb //SpedVlrOutDeb SpedCodOutCred = &SdtSpedE110.SpedCodOutCred SpedDesOutCred = &SdtSpedE110.SpedDesOutCred //SpedVlrOutCred
SpedE116Rec = &SdtSpedE110.SpedE116Rec SpedE116Cod = &SdtSpedE110.SpedE116Cod SpedE116DiaVct = &SdtSpedE110.SpedE116DiaVct SpedContGerC500 = &SdtSpedE110.SpedContGerC500 SpedH010CtaAna = &SdtSpedE110.SpedH010CtaAna SpedContPisCofins = &SdtSpedE110.SpedContPisCofins endNew
Commit
For &SpedM205 in &SdtSpedE110.SpedM205 new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FiLCod SpedAno = &SpedAno SpedMes = &SpedMes SpedM205_Num = &SpedM205.SpedM205_Num SpedM205_Cod = &SpedM205.SpedM205_Cod EndNew EndFor
For &SpedM605 in &SdtSpedE110.SpedM605 new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FiLCod SpedAno = &SpedAno SpedMes = &SpedMes SpedM605_Num = &SpedM605.SpedM605_Num SpedM605_Cod = &SpedM605.SpedM605_Cod EndNew EndFor
Commit
EndFor
